channel.title: GitHub Nextflow Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Nextflow in GitHub

item.title: nf-core/modules
item.description: Repository to host tool-specific module files for the Nextflow DSL2 community!

item.title: nf-core/rnaseq
item.description: RNA sequencing analysis pipeline using STAR, RSEM, HISAT2 or Salmon with gene/isoform counts and extensive quality control.

item.title: nf-core/sarek
item.description: Analysis pipeline to detect germline or somatic variants (pre-processing, variant calling and annotation) from WGS / targeted sequencing

item.title: nf-core/differentialabundance
item.description: Differential abundance analysis for feature/ observation matrices from platforms such as RNA-seq

item.title: nf-core/methylseq
item.description: Methylation (Bisulfite-Sequencing) analysis pipeline using Bismark or bwa-meth + MethylDackel

item.title: nf-core/viralrecon
item.description: Assembly and intrahost/low-frequency variant calling for viral samples

item.title: nf-core/configs
item.description: Config files used to define parameters specific to compute environments at different Institutions

item.title: nf-core/circrna
item.description: circRNA quantification, differential expression analysis and miRNA target prediction of RNA-Seq data

item.title: nf-core/ampliseq
item.description: Amplicon sequencing analysis workflow using DADA2 and QIIME2

item.title: nf-core/clipseq
item.description: CLIP sequencing analysis pipeline for QC, pre-mapping, genome mapping, UMI deduplication, and multiple peak-calling options.

item.title: nf-core/airrflow
item.description: B-cell and T-cell Adaptive Immune Receptor Repertoire (AIRR) sequencing analysis pipeline using the Immcantation framework

item.title: nf-core/spatialvi
item.description: Pipeline for processing spatially-resolved gene counts with spatial coordinates and image data. Designed for 10x Genomics Visium transcriptomics.
